title: Backpacking

vocabulary.meaning: a bag carried on your back during a trip
cheap accommodation often used by travellers
a path used for walking in nature
to stay outdoors in a tent
willing to try new and exciting experiences

questions: Have you ever been backpacking?

How do you think backpacking around the world would change a person?
Is it better to go backpacking alone or with friends?
Do you think backpackers are similar to hippies?
Which is better, a backpack or a suitcase?
What are the negative points or dangers of backpacking?
What are the essential items to put in a backpack?
What is your image of backpackers?
Who would you choose to go backpacking with?
Would you prefer to go on a 2-week luxury cruise or go backpacking for six months?
In which countries would you most and least like to go backpacking?
Is it OK for old people to go backpacking?
Would you like to go backpacking around your own country?
Why is it called 'backpacking' and not 'rucksacking'?
